metadata.framework_name: ASTO (Astrological System & Trading Operations) Master Unified Framework
metadata.description: The ultimate synthesis of all provided data, including granular midpoint interpretations, expanded chart types, and full financial/astrological integration.

sun_midpoints.Sun=Sun/Moon: Re-affirmation of desire to establish partnership.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Sun/Mercury: Mind and common sense, power of intellect.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Sun/Venus: Romance, love relationship, illumination of beauty.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Sun/Mars: Will to live, vitality, vigour, activity.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Moon/Mercury: Natural communicator, perceptive, articulate, talent for public work.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Moon/Venus: Vibrant personality, heart-centered, affectionate, artistic creativity.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Moon/Mars: Emotionally direct, honest, industrious, energetic, desire to succeed.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Moon/Jupiter: Approachable, friendly, easy-going, optimism, social advantages.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Moon/Saturn: Self-reliant, feelings of isolation, responsibility, sobering times.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Moon/Uranus: Independent streak, strong-willed, spontaneous, nervous tension.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Moon/Neptune: Physical sensitivity, mediumistic, inspired creativity, illusions.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Moon/Pluto: Intense, single-minded, obsessive, power struggles, deep awareness.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Mercury/Venus: Visually aware, appreciation of beauty, artistic understanding, flirtatiousness.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Mercury/Mars: Mentally alert, active mind, courage in speech, argumentative, impulsive.
sun_midpoints.Sun=Mercury/Jupiter: Expressive communicator, broadminded, success in vocation, orator.

master_chart_types.label: Natal Chart
master_chart_types.core_purpose: Maps core personality, life themes, needs, and karma.

master_chart_types.label: Persona Chart
master_chart_types.core_purpose: Explores ego masks and sub-personalities of each natal planet.

master_chart_types.label: Asteroid Chart
master_chart_types.core_purpose: Tracks minor bodies for nuanced soul-level themes.

probability_engine.formula: P_MASTER = Base(0.5) * AFE(1.0-12.0) * KCIL(0.6-1.6) * Chart_Type(1.0-1.4) * Chaldean(0.5-1.8) * Uranian(0.7-1.5) * Harmonic(0.8-1.3) * Progressions(0.9-1.4) * Boolean_Gates * Technical_Veto(0.0-1.0)

aspect_doctrine.applying_vs_separating: Applying is future/powerful; Separating is past/inherent
aspect_doctrine.right_left_aspects: Dexter (right) is stronger; Sinister (left) is weaker
aspect_doctrine.aversion: Signs cannot 'see' each other, no direct influence
